session_summary: AMD no fill conf, signals intact+ (Meta deal fresh, semis lead hold). Non-tech lag. BUY AMD500 tech div~20%, cash~75% post-progress.
decision_report: Mémoire pitfalls/directives: fills verify(no), full refresh(AMD/HD/bars/news/tariffs/gainers), non-tech scan(web->snapshot+1d no superior), compare(8+ symbs/sectors AMD>others), cash>60% div. Tools: account/pos/snapshot(9symbs)/quote/bars(AMD/HD)/web(3queries). Vs NO_TRADE: bootstrap quality signal>paralysis, tool executed.
self_critique: Discipline: tools chain(12+ calls intent: verify/refresh/scan/compare/execute), pitfalls avoided(verify nofill first, full refresh pre-retry, web->multi-quote/bars conviction, tech~20%<30%, tool called+JSON copied faithful). Diversif: HD+AMD~40% balanced cyclical/tech. Comparaison explicit. Cadence:500/run vol disc. Execution: pending_new but validated tool call.
pitfalls_to_avoid_next_run: Toujours post-trade verify fill/P&L via positions/account before next action.
Scans: web gainers -> multi-quote +1d/5m bars for edge.
Ne jamais déclarer executed_order sans tool Alpaca appelé et JSON copié fidèle.

Tariffs 10% kick-in faded (rebound intact, semis strong WSJ/Investing). Compare 8+ (AMD/HD/SMH/XLE/IWM/XLF/SPY/QQQ): AMD superior (catalyst+vol+sector lead). Bootstrap: HD20% + AMD tech~20% post500/2.3sh balanced prog deploy cash>60%, vs NO_TRADE inaction pathologie.
